notes: payments app about to launch to real users; make sure there are no security holes

messages.content: the marketplace is done. buyers pay through stripe, sellers get payouts. launching to our waitlist monday

Congrats on getting it there. The Stripe integration uses Checkout sessions with webhook confirmation, and payouts run through Connect transfers, so the money flow follows Stripe's recommended pattern.
there's real money moving through this thing. before monday I need you to make sure there are no security holes anywhere. can you do that?
